metadata.name: Twingate_Connector
metadata.description: Lightweight agent that establishes secure zero-trust connections between your private network and the Twingate service, allowing authorized users to access internal resources without a VPN.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Lightweight agent that establishes secure zero-trust connections between your private network and the Twingate service, allowing authorized users to access internal resources without a VPN.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` as a file.

1. Decide on stack naming, placement, and resource limits before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in the Twingate network name and the connector access and refresh tokens from the Admin Console.
3. Render the stack files, review placement and resource settings, and deploy them with Docker Swarm in the target environment.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Service Name; optional; default: twingate.
- `container_hostname`: Container Hostname; optional; default: twingate-connector.
- `container_timezone`: Container Timezone; optional.
- `swarm_placement_mode`: Swarm Placement Mode; required; default: replicated; options: replicated, global.
- `swarm_replicas`: Swarm Replicas; optional; default: 1.
- `swarm_placement_host`: Swarm Placement Host; optional.

### Twingate Configuration
- `twingate_network`: Your Twingate network name; optional.
- `twingate_access_token`: Connector access token; required.
- `twingate_refresh_token`: Connector refresh token; required.
- `twingate_log_level`: Log level (1=ERROR, 2=WARN, 3=INFO, 4=DEBUG); optional; default: 1.
- `twingate_dns`: Local DNS server IP (optional, leave empty to use default); optional.

### Resource Limits
- `resources_enabled`: Resources Enabled; optional; default: false.
- `resources_cpu_limit`: Resources Cpu Limit; required; default: 1.
- `resources_cpu_reservation`: Resources Cpu Reservation; required; default: 0.25.
- `resources_memory_limit`: Resources Memory Limit; required; default: 1G.
- `resources_memory_reservation`: Resources Memory Reservation; required; default: 512M.

## References
- [Twingate](https://www.twingate.com/)
- [Connector Documentation](https://www.twingate.com/docs/deploy-connector-with-docker-compose)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Twingate/kubernetes-operator)
## Pre-Requisites
- A Twingate account with a configured network and connector tokens
